message
nonce
returnc
    Encrypts and returns the message ``message`` with the secret ``key`` and
    the nonce ``nonce``.
    :param message: bytes
    :param nonce: bytes
    :param key: bytes
    :rtype: bytes

    ``key`` and the nonce ``nonce``.
